mapper.select: SELECT m.*, r.role_name FROM member m LEFT JOIN role r ON m.mem_role_idx = r.role_idx WHERE m.mem_id = #{mem_id} AND mem_is_deleted = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member ( mem_idx, mem_id, mem_pwd, mem_name, mem_tel, mem_email, mem_ip, mem_role_idx, mem_grade_idx, mem_bday, mem_regdate ) VALUES ( nextval('member_mem_idx_seq'), #{mem_id}, #{mem_pwd}, #{mem_name}, #{mem_tel}, #{mem_email}, #{mem_ip}, 1, 1, #{mem_bday}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT * from member where mem_idx=#{ mem_idx }
mapper.update:
UPDATE member SET mem_id = #{mem_id}, mem_pwd = #{mem_pwd}, mem_name = #{mem_name}, mem_tel = #{mem_tel}, mem_email = #{mem_email}, mem_ip = #{mem_ip}, mem_role_idx = #{mem_role_idx}, mem_grade_idx = #{mem_grade_idx}, mem_bday = #{mem_bday}
WHERE mem_idx = #{mem_idx} AND (mem_is_deleted IS NULL OR mem_is_deleted = 'N')
mapper.select:
SELECT m.*, r.role_name, g.grade_name, g.grade_discount_rate, mp.mem_nickname, mp.mem_intro, mp.mem_img, ma.addr_idx, ma.mem_zipcode, ma.mem_addr, ma.mem_addr_detail
FROM member m LEFT OUTER JOIN role r ON m.mem_role_idx = r.role_idx LEFT OUTER JOIN grade g ON m.mem_grade_idx = g.grade_idx LEFT OUTER JOIN member_profile mp ON m.mem_idx = mp.mem_idx LEFT OUTER JOIN member_addr ma ON m.mem_idx = ma.mem_idx
WHERE m.mem_id = #{mem_id} AND (mem_is_deleted IS NULL OR mem_is_deleted = 'N')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_profile WHERE mem_nickname = #{mem_nickname}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_profile ( mem_idx, mem_nickname, mem_intro, mem_img ) VALUES ( #{mem_idx}, #{mem_nickname}, #{mem_intro}, #{mem_img} )
INSERT INTO member_addr ( addr_idx, mem_idx, mem_zipcode, mem_addr, mem_addr_detail ) VALUES ( nextval('member_addr_addr_idx_seq'), #{mem_idx}, #{mem_zipcode}, #{mem_addr}, #{mem_addr_detail} )
mapper.select:
SELECT addr_idx, mem_idx, mem_zipcode, mem_addr, mem_addr_detail
FROM member_addr WHERE mem_idx = #{mem_idx}
